reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de su gente. Por protocolo de COVID no tenían comida pero nos asistieron para comprar en un lugar cercano y volvimos a comer allí. Los baños estaban impecables

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. Due to COVID protocol, they didn't have any food, but they helped us buy it at a nearby location, and we went back to eat there. The bathrooms were spotless.
